content: The 2024-2025 SOTA push for scalable active learning agent memory can be restructured around a nested 'agent-within-agent' architecture, where a lightweight secondary curiosity-driven agent sits inside the main agent to selectively query which new episodic memories get encoded into long-term storage, rather than using pre-defined active acquisition rules. This creates a self-improving memory selection loop that outperforms fixed methods in open-ended environments.
